{{- $opts := . }} {{- $overlayPath := or (index $opts "overlay") site.Params.huggingface.images.overlay }} {{- $imagePath := index $opts "image" }} {{- $tileSize := div (or (index $opts "size") 192) 4 }} {{- $imageSizeString := string (mul 4 $tileSize) }} {{- $overlay := "" }} {{- with resources.Get $overlayPath }} {{- with .Resize (printf "%dx" $tileSize) }} {{ $overlay = images.Overlay . 0 (mul 3 $tileSize) }} {{- else }} {{- errorf "resize overlay image failed: [ %q ]" $overlayPath }} {{ end }} {{- else }} {{- warnf "overlay image not found [ %q ]" $overlayPath }} {{- end }} {{- $image := resources.Get $imagePath }} {{- with $image }} {{- with .Resize (add $imageSizeString "x") }} {{ if $overlay }} {{ with .Filter $overlay }} {{- $image = . }} {{- else }} {{- warnf "apply overlay failed for: [ %q ]" $image }} {{- end }} {{- end }} {{- else }} {{- errorf "resize teaser image failed: [ %q ]" $image }} {{- end }} {{- else }} {{- errorf "teaser image not found [ %q ]" $imagePath }} {{- end }} {{- return $image }} {{- /**/ -}}
